across.clue: Wild pig — like the animals whose territory was disrupted as wildfire near Two Harbors, MN damaged 34 buildings
Hospital drip pouch — like those strained during the hantavirus outbreak hitting cruise ship passengers
Ankle bones — like those of the 90-foot dinosaur unearthed in Thailand that could 'crush four elephants'
Narrow cuts — like those made in Louisiana's primary, where Cassidy lost as Trump vanquished another GOP foe
Blind strip — like the kind on windows, fitting as PG&E warned Northern California counties of likely power shutoffs

down.clue: Binary units — like those powering Google's new Gemini Intelligence, available only on a handful of Android flagships
Egg shapes — like those of the Swatch 'Royal Pop' pocket watches that sent shoppers into a frenzy, forcing store closures
Spanish April — the month evoked as Venezuela deported Maduro ally Alex Saab to the U.S.
Reggae-linked style — like the cultural vibe at the Alabama rally where thousands marched for Black voting rights
Main point — like the takeaway from Trump's return from China: stability and a stalemate, per Reuters
